TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Syanox, title = Syanox, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Syanox} }

S.FORM: Syanox Itiniay i Datong Cen no Yilan ko Syanox a niyaro', 158 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 543 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 90% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 489 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 10% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 54 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal83%, Amis1%, Paiwan1%, Bunun1%, roma3%.
S.PHON: sjano~ux itiniaj i …¨~…ģato~uŇč ¶…ôn no~u ji…ĺan ko~u sjano~ux a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ**%, amis*%, paiwan*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, ro~uma*%.
S.FORM: Syanox Itiniay i Datong Cen no Yilan ko Syanox a niyaro', 158 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 543 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 90% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 489 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 10% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 54 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal83%, Amis1%, Paiwan1%, Bunun1%, roma3%.
S.PHON: sjano~ux itiniaj i …¨~…ģato~uŇč ¶…ôn no~u ji…ĺan ko~u sjano~ux a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ**%, amis*%, paiwan*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, ro~uma*%.
